_meta.note: Wealth figures: AFR Rich List (manual update, annually ~May). Listed equity values auto-updated by GitHub Action. Political donations: AEC annual returns. NHMRC/ARC: budget papers.

_stats.abs_median_salary_note: ABS Employee Earnings Nov 2023 — full-time adult median weekly ordinary earnings × 52
_stats.au_students_note: ACARA 2024 — total enrolments primary + secondary government and non-government schools
_stats.fossil_fuel_subsidies_note: Australia Institute 2024–25 estimate, incl. Fuel Tax Credits ($10.2B), PRRT concessions, exploration deductions
_stats.nhmrc_budget_note: NHMRC Medical Research Endowment Account 2024–25 Budget

billionaires.name: Gina Rinehart
billionaires.wealth_note: Entirely private company — no listed price to track. Manual update required.
billionaires.assetNote: Wealth almost entirely in Hancock Prospecting Pty Ltd — a private unlisted company. Predominantly Pilbara iron ore royalties.
billionaires.inherited: Majority. Iron ore deposits and royalty structures inherited from father Lang Hancock.

billionaires.name: Harry Triguboff
billionaires.wealth_note: Private company (Meriton). No listed price. Manual update required.
billionaires.assetNote: Meriton holds a vast rental apartment portfolio in addition to development pipeline. Sydney-centric with QLD presence.
billionaires.inherited: Self-made. Emigrated from China in 1940s; founded Meriton in 1963.

billionaires.name: Anthony Pratt & family
billionaires.wealth_note: Private company (Visy/Pratt Industries). No listed price. Manual update required.
billionaires.assetNote: Visy (AU/NZ) and Pratt Industries (USA) are both private packaging and recycling empires.
billionaires.inherited: Significant. Richard Pratt founded Visy; Anthony inherited as executive chair in 2009.

billionaires.name: Scott Farquhar
billionaires.wealth_note: Wealth ~90% Atlassian (TEAM, NASDAQ). Auto-updated daily from stock price.
billionaires.assetNote: Wealth is almost entirely in publicly listed Atlassian Corporation. High volatility with stock price.
billionaires.inherited: Self-made. Co-founded Atlassian in 2002 with Mike Cannon-Brookes.

billionaires.name: Clive Palmer
billionaires.wealth_note: Private company (Mineralogy). No listed price. Manual update required.
billionaires.assetNote: Mineralogy controls iron ore royalties in the Pilbara. Palmer also holds significant hotel and property assets.
billionaires.inherited: Self-made, built through mining royalties and legal battles in Queensland.

billionaires.name: Melanie Perkins & Obrecht
billionaires.wealth_note: Private company (Canva). No listed price. Manual update required when Canva IPOs.
billionaires.assetNote: Canva remains private. Valuation based on 2021 fundraising rounds (~$26B USD). IPO would crystallise and potentially trigger CGT.
billionaires.inherited: Self-made. Co-founded Canva in Perth in 2012 with Cliff Obrecht and Cameron Adams.

billionaires.name: Michael Dorrell
billionaires.wealth_note: Private firm (Stonepeak). No listed price. Manual update required.
billionaires.assetNote: Stonepeak is a global alternative investment firm focused on infrastructure assets. Dorrell is founding partner.
billionaires.inherited: Self-made. Founded Stonepeak in 2012 after career at Blackstone.

billionaires.name: Kerry Stokes
billionaires.wealth_note: ~58% wealth in Seven Group Holdings (SVW.AX). Auto-updated daily from ASX price.
billionaires.assetNote: Seven Group Holdings (SVW) is publicly listed. Stokes also holds direct property, art, and media assets.
billionaires.inherited: Self-made. Born in relative poverty in Perth; built a media and industrial empire.
